This flag has made it impossible for us to deposit funds to his commissary or prison tablet, and we are unable to even purchase "stamps" to communicate with him via the XXXX app.

This decision effectively cuts off all electronic communication and financial support for our loved one, which is devastating not only to him but to us as a family trying to stay connected during his incarceration.
